title: Among Us HUD
description: This pack is a simple pack that replaces the health bar with Among us characters.
body:
Replaces the hearts with red among us characters.

Replaces the golden apple hearts with Yellow Among Us characters.

Replaces the Wither hearts with black Among Us characters.

How to Install

Installation place the Among Us Gui - 1.20.2.zip into your .minecraft\resourcepacks

Make sure its at the top to replace the textures.
